scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n shared,gateway,auth,attendance,activity,request,config,notification -c blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta,red,white,gray "npm run dev -w packages/shared" "npm run dev -w services/gateway" "npm run dev -w services/auth" "npm run dev -w services/attendance" "npm run dev -w services/activity" "npm run dev -w services/request" "npm run dev -w services/config" "npm run dev -w services/notification"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently "npm run build -w services/gateway" "npm run build -w services/auth" "npm run build -w services/attendance" "npm run build -w services/activity" "npm run build -w services/request" "npm run build -w services/config" "npm run build -w services/notification"
scripts.prisma:generate: prisma generate --schema=services/auth/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema=services/attendance/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema=services/activity/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema=services/request/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema=services/config/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema=services/notification/prisma/schema.prisma
